narrative: Markets rotated out of AI-linked mega-cap tech late in the week after Oracle’s sharp post-earnings selloff raised doubts about the near-term payoff from heavy AI spending and debt issuance ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/oracle-shares-drop-12-europe-after-forecasts-miss-wall-st-targets-2025-12-11/)). Selling intensified Friday when Broadcom warned that rising sales of lower-margin custom AI processors could pressure profitability, sending AVGO shares down more than 11% and dragging the Nasdaq lower ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/ai-bellwether-broadcom-shares-fall-5-day-after-results-2025-12-12/)). Despite weakness in large-cap growth, small caps outperformed on easing expectations and broader rotation, leaving the Russell 2000 up on the week while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq finished lower ([The Seattle Times](https://www.seattletimes.com/business/how-major-us-stock-indexes-fared-friday-12-12-2025/)).

value_picks.name: PayPal Holdings, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: PayPal was still a major 2025 laggard with a low-teens/10x P/E and double‑digit FCF yield, reflecting skepticism about branded checkout growth and competitive pressure despite steady profitability and cash generation.
value_picks.bull_case: If management stabilizes branded checkout and continues disciplined buybacks, the market can re-rate PYPL toward a market multiple, with FCF supporting downside protection.

value_picks.name: UMB Financial Corporation
value_picks.why_undervalued: Regional banks like UMBF traded at modest multiples into late 2025 as investors discounted credit-cycle risk, despite solid profitability and cash generation.
value_picks.bull_case: If the macro/credit backdrop stays benign, UMBF’s earnings power plus a ~12x P/E can support a rebound toward prior highs as rate volatility normalizes.

value_picks.name: Columbia Banking System, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: COLB remained discounted versus history as investors fretted about regional-bank funding costs and commercial real estate exposure, even as the franchise produced meaningful free cash flow.
value_picks.bull_case: Improving deposit betas and credit stability could drive multiple expansion from ~12x and lift the stock off cycle-trough levels.

value_picks.name: DexCom, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: DexCom had retrenched materially from prior highs into late 2025 after a sharp 2025 drawdown, leaving a high-quality diabetes CGM franchise priced more like a mature medtech despite ongoing category growth.
value_picks.bull_case: Re-acceleration in CGM adoption and operating leverage could rebuild confidence and drive a growth-multiple re-rate from depressed levels.

value_picks.name: Freshworks Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: SMB software names like Freshworks traded at compressed valuations in 2025; by year-end it screened with a positive FCF yield, suggesting improving unit economics despite weak sentiment.
value_picks.bull_case: If growth stabilizes and margins continue to expand, FRSH can compound FCF and re-rate toward faster-growing SaaS peers.

momentum_picks.name: Capricor Therapeutics, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Capricor surged in December 2025 after announcing positive topline results from its pivotal Phase 3 HOPE-3 study of Deramiocel in Duchenne muscular dystrophy, triggering a major revaluation.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High upside if regulatory path crystallizes, but binary clinical/regulatory and financing risk remains elevated.

momentum_picks.name: Sidus Space, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Sidus Space rallied sharply into mid-December 2025 amid company updates on satellite commissioning and momentum-driven small-cap space/defense appetite.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Momentum is strong but liquidity/volatility are extreme and execution risk is high for a microcap.

momentum_picks.name: PACS Group, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: PACS was a standout November 2025 gainer, reflecting strong price action into December as investors rotated into healthcare services names with improving fundamentals.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: At a much higher price, any growth hiccup could compress the multiple quickly.

momentum_picks.name: Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Olema posted outsized gains in November 2025, typical of biotech breakouts driven by trial readouts/expectations into year-end.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Biotech momentum can reverse quickly on data; position sizing is critical.

momentum_picks.name: MMTec, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: MMTec was the top-performing US-listed stock in November 2025, carrying momentum into December amid speculative interest.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Very high-risk microcap where upside is purely momentum-driven and drawdowns can be severe.

watchlist_updates.detail: Broadcom shares dropped 11% on Dec 12 despite beating Q4 earnings estimates, due to concerns over AI chip backlog and lower-margin custom AI processor sales squeezing profitability.
Oracle experienced a steep decline on Thursday Dec 11 following its earnings report, contributing to tech sector weakness.
Costco hit near 52-week low of $871.14 on Dec 10 at $874.40 ahead of Q1 earnings on Dec 11.
NVIDIA staged a downside reversal closing at new weekly low down 4.05% amid AI bubble fears and tech selloff.

sources: [The Seattle Times](https://www.seattletimes.com/business/how-major-us-stock-indexes-fared-friday-12-12-2025/), [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/oracle-shares-drop-12-europe-after-forecasts-miss-wall-st-targets-2025-12-11/), [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/ai-bellwether-broadcom-shares-fall-5-day-after-results-2025-12-12/), [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/major-us-stock-indexes-fared-211841949.html), [WSJ](https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-sp-500-nasdaq-12-12-2025), [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/investingforbeginners/comments/1pjgsp9/top_stocks_hitting_52week_highslows_december_10/), [MarketScreener](https://www.marketscreener.com/news/earnings-calendar-for-week-of-december-8-12-2025-oracle-adobe-broadcom-a-trio-to-watch-ce7d51ddda8cf722), [Intraday Dynamics](https://intradaydynamics.com/12-12-2025-technical-update-djia-sp-500/), [Yahoo Finance (undervalued cash-flow list)](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/december-2025s-top-stocks-estimated-173804267.html), [Stock Titan (Dec 2025 monthly gainers)](https://www.stocktitan.net/rankings/stock-gains-monthly/2025/december), [Stock Titan (Nov 2025 monthly gainers)](https://www.stocktitan.net/rankings/stock-gains-monthly/2025/november), [Stock Titan (Dec 2025 news-driven gainers)](https://www.stocktitan.net/rankings/top-news/gainers/2025-12)
